code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn build_output(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in xs
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let nums = parse_ints(line1)
      let ts = parse_ints(line2)
      match list.get(ts, 0)
      when Some(t)
        mut filtered: List<Int> = []
        for x in nums
          if x > t
            filtered = list.push(filtered, x)
          end
        end
        println(build_output(filtered))
      when None
        println("")
      end
    when None
      println("")
    end
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
